Graduate School Calendar

Spring 2026

All deadlines are at 11:59 PM unless otherwise stated.

Source: Graduate School Calendar PDF — https://www.grad.msstate.edu/students/graduate-school-calendar

Date Description
January 5 – 8 Graduate Teaching Assistant Workshop and Classroom Certification
January 14 Classes Begin
January 19 Holiday
January 21 Last day to drop a course without a grade (5th class day) – 11:59 p.m.
January 22 Last day to register or add a course (6th class day) – 5:00 p.m.
January 28 – March 27 Apply online via MyState for May 2026 graduation – a $50 fee applies.
February 8 Deadline for TAGGS online application for January 1 – June 30, 2026 travel period.
February 14 Spring Graduate Student Research Symposium
February 17 Mardi Grad Open House
March 1 Deadline for Summer 2026 international applicants applying to degree programs
March 4 Mid-point of the semester
March 5 Last day to drop a class with a W grade (36th class day) – 5:00 p.m.
March 9 – 13 Spring Break – No Classes Scheduled (Dates Subject to Change)
March 16 – 27 Image of Research Exhibit
March 20 Last day for thesis/dissertation defense for May graduation
March 27 Last day to apply for May 2026 degree via MyState with a $50 fee
April 2 Last day for initial submission of thesis/dissertation to the Library for May graduation
April 3 Holiday (Classes will not meet; University offices closed)
April 6 Holiday (Classes will not meet; University offices open)
April 7 – 17 Pre-registration period for summer and fall semesters
April 20 Last day to withdraw from the University (10 days of class remaining)
May 1 Deadline for Fall 2026 international applicants applying to degree programs
May 4 Last regularly scheduled class day
May 12 Doctoral Graduation and Hooding Ceremony (Ph.D. and Ed.D.) – 4:00 p.m.
May 13 MSU-Meridian Commencement – 11:00 a.m.
May 14 Starkville Campus Commencement – 9:30 a.m. (Humphrey Coliseum)
May 15 Starkville Campus Commencement – 9:30 a.m. (Humphrey Coliseum)
May 18 Final Grades Due – 10:00 a.m.
